mapper.select: SELECT bw.board_id AS boardId, bw.widget_id AS widgetId, w.name AS widgetName, bw.row_index AS rowIndex, bw.column_index AS columnIndex, bw.width_cols AS widthCols, bw.height_px AS heightPx, bw.pos_x AS posX, bw.pos_y AS posY, bw.pos_ex AS posEx, bw.pos_ey AS posEy, bw.sort_order AS sortOrder FROM ib_board_widget bw LEFT JOIN ib_widget w ON w.widget_id = bw.widget_id WHERE bw.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY bw.sort_order, bw.row_index, bw.column_index
